name: DNS Query To Ufile.io - DNS Client
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: DNS Query To Ufile.io - DNS Client
SIGMA Description: Detects DNS queries to "ufile.io", which was seen abused by malware and threat actors as a method for data exfiltration

False positives:
- DNS queries for "ufile" are not malicious by nature necessarily. Investigate the source to determine the necessary actions to take

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3008 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ufile.io%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DNS Query To Ufile.io - DNS Client on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3008 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ufile.io%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: DNS Query To Ufile.io - DNS Client
